choice: A general-purpose retirement planning app, built for and first deployed by Raghu and his wife, but with nothing hard-coded to them: one household per deployment, all personal data (people, accounts, assumptions) is configuration/data, so others can self-deploy. Not a multi-tenant SaaS in v1; distribution model TBD.
rationale: User clarified: treat it as a general-purpose app others could deploy; don't hard-code Raghu + Valli
